# format: html5-dom-v2

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Icon test"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="h1" attrs=[]
        "Status"
      "\n"
      element ns=svg local="svg" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="viewBox" value="0 0 10 10"}]
        element ns=svg local="circle" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="cx" value="5"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="cy" value="5"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="r" value="4"}]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
        "All systems operational."
      "\n"
